task: My name is Mike. I want to send my friend Christene (christenson@gmail.com) a Dillard's “Merry Christmas” eGift Card worth $100 for next Christmas, with the message “Merry Christmas, wish you many more years to come.” Add it to my cart.
final_result_response: The task is **impossible** to complete as specified. After thoroughly reviewing all available eGift Card designs on Dillard's website (browsing through the entire carousel and checking the dropdown menu), there is no "Merry Christmas" eGift Card design available. The site currently offers only 11 designs, none of which are Christmas-themed. This is likely because Christmas-themed cards are seasonal and not offered in March.
